title: Passport Security
description: Cryptographic integrity fields for Agent Tool Passports. Covers registry signatures (tamper-proof passports), reviewer attestation format (verifiable review claims), and webhook signatures (payment callback authenticity). All communications must use TLS 1.2+.

RegistrySignature.description: Signature produced by the OpenTrust registry over the canonical passport content. Allows any agent to verify a passport offline without trusting the serving endpoint. Registry public keys are published at https://opentrust.dev/.well-known/opentrust-keys.json

key_id.description: Identifier for the signing key. Format: 'opentrust-registry-{year}-{n}'. Clients look this up in the well-known key set.

algorithm.description: Ed25519 is the required signing algorithm. Fast, small signatures, widely supported.

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the registry signed this passport version.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical passport JSON (keys sorted, whitespace normalized, security.registry_signature field excluded before hashing). Format: 'sha256:{hex}'.

ReviewerAttestation.description: Cryptographic attestation format for reviewer signatures in review_history. A reviewer signs a specific trust claim about a specific passport version. Verifiable offline against the reviewer's registered public key.

key_id.description: The reviewer's registered key ID. Reviewers register their Ed25519 public key with the registry before they can sign attestations.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the SHA-256 hash of payload.

payload.description: The exact string that was signed. Format: '{slug}:{version_hash.version}:{trust_status}:{signed_at_iso8601}'. Example: 'github-file-search:1.2.0:reviewer_signed:2026-05-14T10:00:00Z'. Clients can reconstruct and verify this independently.

WebhookSignatureConfig.description: Configuration for verifying signed webhook callbacks (payment confirmations, escrow events, delivery proofs). Tools must verify these before acting on payment events.

algorithm.description: HMAC-SHA256 over the raw request body. The shared secret is established during tool registration.

header.description: HTTP header containing the signature. Format: 'hmac-sha256={base64_signature}'.

timestamp_header.description: Unix timestamp of when the webhook was sent. Tools must reject webhooks older than 300 seconds to prevent replay attacks.

replay_window_seconds.description: Webhooks older than 300 seconds must be rejected regardless of signature validity.

secret_rotation.description: How often the HMAC secret should be rotated. 90_days is the minimum recommended.

TransportRequirements.description: Minimum transport security requirements for all OpenTrust protocol communications.

tls_minimum.description: TLS 1.2 is the minimum. TLS 1.3 is recommended.

certificate_pinning.description: Whether this tool's server uses certificate pinning. Recommended for tools with wallet or private_data access.

hsts.description: Whether the server enforces HTTP Strict Transport Security.

description: Security configuration embedded in a passport. All fields are optional but registry_signature is added automatically when the passport is registered.
